name: LogicMark, Inc.
summary: LogicMark, Inc. (LGMK) provides personal emergency response systems (PERS), health communications devices, and IoT technology forming a connected care platform. Products include two-way voice communication pendants, fall detection devices, and mobile safety apps sold direct-to-consumer via eCommerce and Amazon, through dealers and resellers, and directly to the U.S. Veterans Health Administration (VHA). The company has sold over 900,000 PERS devices since 2012, with over 700,000 sold to the U.S. government.

products.name: Guardian Alert 911 Plus
products.description: Two-way voice pendant with fall detection, 4G cellular, 911 direct dial, no monthly fee, IP-67 water-resistant.

products.name: Freedom Alert
products.description: Two-way voice landline-based in-home pendant with 911 forwarding, up to 600ft range, no monthly fee.

products.name: Freedom Alert Mini
products.description: 4G LTE mobile PERS device with fall detection, GPS, geofencing, 24/7 monitoring, monthly monitoring fee.

products.name: Freedom Alert Max
products.description: 4G LTE PERS unit and cellular phone with fall detection, GPS, geofencing, emergency caregiver video, and unlimited calling.

products.name: LifeSentry Monitored PERS
products.description: Monitored PERS product sold direct-to-consumers through the Company's website beginning in 2023.

products.name: Aster
products.description: On-the-go personal safety app with 24/7 monitoring and Bluetooth button, released in early 2024.

partnerships.description: Long-standing direct sales partnership; over 700,000 PERS devices sold to VHA since 2012.
Five-year GSA Agreement awarded July 2021, renewable up to 25 years, enabling sales to federal, state, and local governments.
